Saw IV (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $63,300,095Details
International Box Office $72,459,599
Worldwide Box Office $135,759,694
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $32,736,502
Total $32,736,502
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$31,756,764 (50.2% of total gross)
Legs:1.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 13.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,183 opening theaters/3,183 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $110,039,116

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 26th, 2007 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 22nd, 2008 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sequences of grisly bloody violence and torture throughout, and for language
Running Time: 95 minutes
Franchise: Saw
Plot point: Escape, Non-Chronological, Serial Killer, Torture Porn, Trapped
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Twisted Pictures, A Bigger Boat Productions, Serendipity Prods
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
